drivers.notes: 10 × 55 mm planar ribbon — part of the EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter module
Part of the EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter module

drivers.material: paper + wood-fibre cone, Balanced Drive SMC
Balanced Drive SMC Gen-2 with dual voice-coil

description.en: Dali's flagship floorstander, the Kore is a five-driver, four-way reference design built around the EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter — a 35 mm soft dome paired with a 55 mm planar ribbon — flanked by an SMC-loaded midrange and twin 11½″ Balanced Drive woofers. Cabinet, crossover and drivers were developed from the ground up over six years to set a new benchmark for the brand.
description.es: El tope de gama de Dali. Es un diseño floorstander de cuatro vías y cinco transductores construido alrededor del EVO-K Hybrid Tweeter — un domo suave de 35 mm acompañado de una cinta plana de 55 mm — junto a un midrange con tecnología SMC y dos woofers Balanced Drive de 11½″. Gabinete, crossover y parlantes fueron desarrollados desde cero durante seis años para fijar un nuevo nivel de referencia para la marca.
